I also found that Shin Hye-sung has been a member of Shinhwa since its formation in 1998 and has been involved in the group's music for over 20 years. Charlie Huhn, on the other hand, has had a more varied career, playing with several bands and artists over the years. However, I couldn't find any information that suggests Shin Hye-sung has played in more bands than Charlie Huhn. In fact, it seems that Charlie Huhn has had a more extensive career with multiple bands and collaborations. Therefore, I'm going to conclude that Charlie Huhn has played in more bands than Shin Hye-sung. </think>
<answer> Charlie Huhn </answer>
